mapper.sql: select s.schedule_id, s.schedule_title, s.owner_id, u.nick_name as owner_name, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.remind_time, s.schedule_type, s.schedule_status, case s.schedule_status when 'pending' then '待处理' when 'completed' then '已完成' when 'cancelled' then '已取消' else s.schedule_status end as schedule_status_label, s.remark, s.create_time, s.update_time, '' as create_by, '' as update_by from oa_schedule s left join sys_user u on s.owner_id = u.user_id
